title: Patna Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Patna Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: Patna Bird Sanctuary is a protected area in Uttar Pradesh's Etah district encompassing a lentic lake that is an important wintering ground for migrating birds..
overview.description: Patna Bird Sanctuary is a protected area in Uttar Pradesh's Etah district encompassing a lentic lake that is an important wintering ground for migrating birds.. It is situated near a town Jalesar which is also known as Ghungroo Nagari or Bell City. It was founded in 1991 and covers an area of 1.09 km2 (0.42 sq mi). With a lake area of only 1 km2 (0.39 sq mi), it is the smallest bird sanctuary in Uttar Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Jalesar
topPlaces.description: Jalesar is a Nagar Palika in Etah Sub District, Etah district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. There is a fort of Awagarh near Jalesar, Awagarh is 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) from Jalesar It is connected by road to other towns such as Hathras, Etah, Aligarh, Firozabad and Agra.

items.note: Jalesar is a Nagar Palika in Etah Sub District, Etah district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. There is a fort of Awagarh near Jalesar, Awagarh is 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) from Jalesar It is connected by road to other towns such as Hathras, Etah, Aligarh, Firozabad and Agra.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Patna Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Patna Bird Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Patna Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Agra Airport (Pandit Deen Dayal Upadhyay) (51 km) and the nearest railway station is Agra Cantt (49 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Patna Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Patna Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Patna Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Patna Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.
